MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: P. Dias/D. Boffi; Reporter: Floyd Butler. Arnold W. Evje, Esq. represented Plaintiff City Housing, Inc. and there being no appearance by Defendant Jerald Walsh, the case is removed from the settlement conference calendar, request for jury trial is sticken and the trial date is confirmed.
